2009 Honda Varadero 125 - Low Mileage, A1 Adventure Ready
The legendary 'baby Vara' – a full-sized, V-twin adventure bike for A1 licence holders, with genuinely low mileage.
For riders seeking something different from the usual 125cc fare, the Honda Varadero 125 stands apart. Built with the spirit of its larger-capacity sibling, the XL1000 Varadero, this 'baby Vara' offers a substantial, confidence-inspiring ride that feels like a big bike. With its distinctive V-twin engine, full-sized chassis, and long-distance comfort, it is the ultimate 125cc machine for taller riders, commuters, and aspiring adventurers alike.

Unique V-twin engine

Full-sized chassis

Business seller

Description
This 2009 Honda Varadero 125 is a superb example of a bike that has achieved cult status. Often referred to as the 'baby Vara', it uniquely combines learner-legal 125cc status with the styling, presence, and comfort of a full-size adventure tourer. Its 125cc liquid-cooled V-twin engine is a standout feature, delivering smoother power and a more appealing exhaust note than the ubiquitous single-cylinder alternatives.
The bike presents in black and is reported by the seller, Knights Motorcycles, to have covered genuinely low mileage. Having had four previous owners, it is now offered for sale by an established business seller with a 100% positive feedback rating, providing peace of mind that is often lacking in private sales.
Whether you are a taller rider finding other 125s too cramped, a commuter who appreciates motorway stability, or an adventurer looking to start your journey, the Varadero 125 is an incredibly capable and characterful choice. It holds its value remarkably well for good reason.
The 2009 Honda Varadero 125 is a sleek black motorcycle with low mileage, making it a reliable choice for riders. With only 4 owners, this Honda XL model is sure to have a history of maintenance and care. Whether you are a seasoned rider or a beginner looking for a trustworthy vehicle, this Honda Varadero 125 is definitely available and ready to hit the road.

The 125cc, fuel-injected, single-cylinder engine produces a capable 15 bhp, new riders, or experienced motorcyclists seeking an economical and fun commuter. The six-speed gearbox is slick and precise, helping you make the most of the engine's power band.

With 15 horsepower under the hood, this GSX-R 125 is sure to provide an exhilarating riding experience for any motorcycle enthusiast. Plus, with delivery available, you can have this impressive bike in your garage in no time.

The 2021Honda CB125F is a stylish and efficient motorcycle with low mileage, making it a great choice for those looking for a reliable and affordable ride. This white-coloured bike is sure to turn heads on the road and provide a smooth and enjoyable riding experience. Presented by knightsmotorcycles, a trusted business seller with 100% positive feedback, this YZF-R125 represents a straightforward and dependable way into sporty two-wheeled transport. It's a bike that looks the part, rides superbly, and holds its value – a true win for any new rider.

If you're looking for a motorcycle that truly does it all, this 2010 Honda XL700 Transalp is a superb choice. Description
This 2010 Honda XL700 Transalp is a fantastic example of one of the most respected adventure motorcycles ever built. The seller describes it as being in "great condition," and with 23,000 miles, this V-twin is just nicely run in. Honda’s 680cc engine is renowned for its smooth power delivery and legendary longevity, making this bike a trusted companion for years to come.
The Transalp's genius is its simplicity and versatility. The upright seating position offers excellent comfort and visibility in traffic, while the long-travel suspension and chain drive make it capable of handling rough roads and light trails with ease. The electric start fires up the motor instantly, and the six-speed gearbox is smooth and well-spaced for both town work and motorway cruising.
Presented in a striking white, this bike stands out from the crowd. Whether you are a seasoned adventure rider looking for a classic, or a commuter wanting something more capable and characterful than a standard street bike, this Transalp is an outstanding choice.

This 2022 KTM Duke 125 is an excellent opportunity to own one of the most popular and highly-regarded 125cc motorcycles on the market. Known affectionately as "The Scalpel" for its sharp handling and precision, the Duke 125 offers a riding experience that feels far more substantial than its engine size suggests.
Finished in stealthy black, this example presents well and has covered just 7,000 miles. The 125cc single-cylinder engine is renowned for its punchy low-end torque, making it ideal for urban riding and confident progress on faster A-roads. The lightweight trellis frame, upside-down front forks, and radial brakes (features borrowed from KTM's larger capacity bikes) provide a level of handling that sets the Duke apart from conventional 125cc commuters.
Whether you are taking your first steps on an A1 licence, or simply want a stylish and capable runabout, this KTM delivers in spades.

This 2021 Yamaha YZF-R125 is a superb example of Yamaha's class-leading 125cc sports bike. It brings the full racetrack aesthetic of the legendary R range to the A1 licence category, featuring the same aggressive bodywork, dual headlights, and premium detailing as its bigger brothers.
The R125 is renowned for its focused riding position, sophisticated suspension with an inverted fork, and the rigid Deltabox frame that delivers sharp, precise handling. Whether you're a new rider looking for your first taste of sports bike performance, or an experienced enthusiast wanting a nimble and economical machine for weekend fun, this R125 delivers an engaging and authentic experience.

Description
This 2019 Yamaha MT125 ABS is a superb example of Yamaha's popular entry-level naked bike. It brings the bold, aggressive design language of the larger MT family to the 125cc class, creating a machine that looks as thrilling as it is to ride. The lightweight chassis and inverted front fork deliver sharp, responsive handling that inspires confidence in new riders and puts a smile on the face of any enthusiast.
With 11,200 miles on the clock, this MT125 is well-proven and ready for many more. The 15bhp liquid-cooled, four-stroke engine is smooth, refined, and perfectly suited to A1 licence requirements. The six-speed gearbox lets you make the most of the power, whether you're filtering through city traffic or enjoying a weekend B-road blast.

Description
This 2020 Yamaha R3 ABS is a fantastic example of Yamaha's popular entry-level sportbike. With its lightweight chassis, responsive 320cc twin-cylinder engine, and sharp handling, the R3 has earned its reputation as one of the best bikes in its class.
The bike presents in excellent condition with its striking black colour scheme. At just 2,450 miles, it has barely been run in, offering years of reliable riding ahead. The ABS system provides added peace of mind, particularly useful for newer riders or those riding in variable UK weather conditions.
Whether you're commuting through city traffic, enjoying weekend B-road blasts, or using it as a stepping stone into the world of sportbikes, this R3 is ready and waiting.
The 2020 70plate Yamaha R3 ABS motorcycle has a six-speed manual transmission and a 320cc engine, ideal for those looking for a sporty yet beginner-friendly ride. With only 2450 miles on the clock, this black Yamaha R3 has low mileage and is ready for delivery. Manufactured by Yamaha, this model is known for its sleek design, smooth performance, and reliability. Whether you're commuting to work or taking a weekend joyride, this Yamaha R3 is sure to impress with its balance of power and agility.
